x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: OT CI relationship volume reflects the fidelity of the OT topology model. Rich relationship data enables Now Assist to perform impact analysis and allows AI Agents to understand blast radius when assessing OT security incidents.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure OT CI relationships are mapped in the CMDB.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_53f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cff
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[OT CI relationship volume reflects the fidelity of the OT topology model. Rich relationship data enables Now Assist to perform impact analysis and allows AI Agents to understand blast radius when assessing OT security incidents.]]></ai_justification><check_name>OT CI Relationships Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("cmdb_rel_ci");
ga.addQuery("parent.sys_class_name","cmdb_ci_ot");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" relationships",finding:c+" OT CI relationships found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" relationships",finding:c+" OT CI relationships found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 relationships",finding:"No OT CI relationships found."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>OTSM</module><number>CHK0000554</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Ensure OT CI relationships are mapped in the CMDB.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>53f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cff</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>OT CI Relationships Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_53f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cff</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
